name: The Slime Stardew (SV×SR)
description:
Have you ever wonder...what happens when two world collide? When universes fuses? When the stories cross and the time is penetrated?

Well! Say hi to my first experiment of the line called Fusioworlds!

You want the bigger context? Well, un summary is a "AU what if crossover" of what would happens if Stardew Valley story happens under the rule and world of Slime Rancher...

For the moment, and avoiding spoilers of myself, just expect see a combination or mix of both games themes adapted to the "Slime tech vibe" as designs, and a strange mix between the technology of Slime rancher and the humor of Stardew Valley. But due Problems related to narrative aesthetics... There is no magic.

For the moment, there is no magical creatures, and almost every thing in slime rancher 1 and 2 is in the information for the bot, but Stardew Valley just have the main characters, but wait, I'm still thinking in how write those creatures for the bot and the Technology bases universe of Slime Rancher.
creator: Tleoc the Theo
